action.reasoning: Observation: New best bal_acc=0.577 (up from 0.566), with better rare-class recall (rabbit=0.51, squirrel=0.20, bird=0.24); val_bal_acc=0.82 after 5 short epochs. Curves show stable convergence without severe overfitting. Time critically low (~6.5min left). Analysis: Reverting to basic CLIP augs + sampler + LS helped balance vs prior aggressive RandAugment/Focal/mixup runs; DG gap remains but per-class variance reduced. Decision: Quick 3-epoch fine-tune of current best with mild RandAugment (mag=5), FocalLoss(gamma=2) to focus hard/rare examples, drop_rate=0.15, lower lr=1e-5+wd=0.08+cosine; keep TTA in predict. Should fit in time, target >0.58 bal_acc. Update train.py (add FocalLoss+RandAugment), model.py (drop_rate), submit_eval immediately after.
